{{Quote|It's a simple, low-threat freighter. A modified Mon Cal ''DeepWater'' class. Decent armor, decent shields, nothing special.|Imperial Captain [[Calo Drusan]]|<ref name="Choices of One">''[[Choices of One]]''</ref>}}
The '''''DeepWater''-class light freighter''' was a [[Mon Calamari Shipyards/Legends|Mon Calamari Shipyards]] transport design.

==Characteristics==
Like all [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] designs, each ''DeepWater'' freighter was slightly different. The ''DeepWater''-class freighter measured 45 meters in length and could transport up to six passengers and 85 metric tons of cargo. It was armed with a dual [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] in its stock configuration.

As was typical of Mon Calamari design philosophy, the ''DeepWater''-class had a sturdy hull, strong shields, and a backup shield generator. For space travel, it was also equipped with a hyperdrive generator. Being designed on a water world, it was also capable of operating as a submarine. When underwater, propulsion was supplied by a [[Magnetohydrodynamic engine]].<ref name="StockShips" />

In addition, each ''Deepwater''-class had a variety of landing gear that could be deployed as required: a landing claw to stabilize the ship when docking with an another vessel or an asteroid, standard landing gear, and inflatable puncture-proof pontoons for landing on water.<ref name="StockShips" />

==History==
The ''DeepWater''-class predated the standard Mon Calamari light freighters and was one of the first commercially-available Mon Calamari designs. It was designed for a planetary trading company called the [[Mon Calamari Commercial Expeditionary Service]] which was abruptly shut down by the  [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. The approximately 10,000 ships produced were then sold at auction.<ref name="StockShips" />

[[Kal Skirata]] purchased one for 80,000 credits in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], which he named ''[[Aay'han]]''.
Skirata used this freighter to rescue a Mandalorian named [[Walon Vau]], on the ice-planet [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]]. It was also used to search for rogue Kaminoan scientist, [[Ko Sai/Legends|Ko Sai]].

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Senior Captain in the Imperial Navy [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] and his companion [[Jorj Car'das]] flew one of these freighters, named the ''[[Lost Reef]]'', on their successful mission to stop alien warlord [[Nuso Esva]] in his scheme to conquer the [[Candoras sector/Legends|Candoras sector]].
